content.query:
create view v_PaidInvoicesSMG
-- drop view v_PaidInvoicesSMG
as
SELECT      A.CINO, A.CUNO, A.ACDT, ROUND(InvAmt2/NULLIF(count(PONR) OVER (PARTITION BY ORNO),0),2) as InvAmt
,           B.*
FROM
(
SELECT      CINO, CUNO, MAX(ACDT) as ACDT, SUM(CUAM) as InvAmt2
FROM        M3.FSLEDG
WHERE       TRCD = '20'
AND         CUNO IN
(
'50009',
'50322',
'50229',
'50438',
'50002',
'50290',
'50031',
'50690',
'50742',
'50218',
'50018',
'50021',
'50015',
'50582',
'50025',
'50085'
)
AND         ACDT >= '2023-01-01'
GROUP BY    CINO, CUNO
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
select      DISTINCT EXIN, DLIX, ORNO, PONR, POSX
FROM        M3.ODLINE

) B        ON A.CINO = B.EXIN
